hero.heading: After Dark in Burbank.
hero.subheading: Hand-crafted cocktails, low light, vinyl on the speakers. Open every night until 2 AM.

about.heading: 370 reviews. 4.4 stars. Burbank's after-hours secret.
paragraphs: The Blue Room is what a cocktail bar is supposed to be — dim lights, attentive bartenders, and a drink menu that rewards curiosity. We pour stiff, we mix slow, and we never rush a good night.
Open from late morning to last call seven nights a week. Walk in solo, bring a date, or hold the whole back room — we'll set the tone.

services.title: Classic Cocktails
services.description: Old fashioneds, manhattans, negronis — the canon, executed with intent.

services.title: House Originals
services.description: A rotating menu of bartender-developed cocktails inspired by what's in season.

services.title: Wine & Beer
services.description: A curated by-the-glass list and a tight, well-chosen draft selection.

services.title: Small Plates
services.description: Late-night bites — flatbreads, charcuterie, and seasonal snacks to keep the conversation going.

services.title: Private Bookings
services.description: Reserve the back lounge for birthdays, industry nights, and after-parties.

services.title: Happy Hour
services.description: Weekday early-evening pricing on house pours and small plates.

reviews.name: Alex M.
reviews.text: Easily the best cocktail program in Burbank. The bartender remembered my order from a month ago.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Dark, sexy, low-key. Perfect first-date spot. Cocktails are stiff and beautifully balanced.

reviews.name: Marco D.
reviews.text: Late hours are clutch. Came in at midnight, full menu still going, music on point. My new spot.

contact.address: 916 S San Fernando Blvd, Burbank, CA
contact.mapEmbedQuery: The Blue Room, 916 S San Fernando Blvd, Burbank, CA

seo.title: The Blue Room — Cocktail Bar in Burbank, CA | Open Nightly Until 2 AM
seo.description: Hand-crafted cocktails, late-night small plates, and Burbank's best after-hours atmosphere. Open every day 10 AM – 2 AM.
